source: Claims against Malayan Government. Grindlay & CO Ltd.__CO273:670:7
filename: Claims against Malayan Government. Grindlay & CO Ltd.__CO273:670:7.txt
summary:
- **Core topic/purpose:** Consideration and settlement of a **claim against the Malayan/Straits Settlements Government** submitted by **Messrs. Grindlay & Co. Ltd.** for unpaid charges connected with an opium shipment.
- **Geography/time period:** Transaction involves **Calcutta → Singapore** (Straits Settlements, Malaya); correspondence and decisions span **Dec 1941 to May 1943**, with repeated reference to payment/verification being delayed until **re-occupation of Malaya** (wartime context implied).
- **Underlying transaction:** **25 cases of Afghan opium** shipped to Singapore for account of the **Straits Settlements Government**; shipment said to have been received from an Afghan source (OCR unclear: “Banke Millie Afghan, Kabul”).
- **Amounts claimed:** (1) **Freight/insurance/shipping charges** billed **4 Dec 1941** for **Rs. 5,626/12/3** (stated unpaid). (2) **Balance of purchase price** withheld: **5%** of invoice value (OCR shows invoice value about **£3,000**; withheld amount discussed as **£250** and also appears as **£350** in one place—uncertainty due to OCR/record inconsistency).
- **Key decision/proposal:** Officials debate whether Grindlays acted as **agents for the Straits Settlements Government** or for the Afghan vendors; they conclude the **Rs. 5,626/12/3** charge was due in India and should be **paid**, but the **£250 balance** should **not be paid yet** because it was likely retained pending quality/specification checks (e.g., morphine content) and records in Singapore could not be examined until re-occupation.
- **Actors/organizations:** **Colonial Office** (including **J.J. Paskin**; letter issued “by direction of **Colonel Oliver Stanley**”), **Crown Agents for the Colonies** (to execute payment), **Grindlay & Co. Ltd.** (London/Calcutta branch), and the **Straits Settlements Government**.
- **Notable numbers/dates/terms:** Instruction to pay **Rs. 5,626.12.3** **with interest at 3½%** from **4 Dec 1941** to date of payment (rate aligned with other Straits Settlements Government settlements); Grindlays had apparently claimed **4%** interest and were asked to justify it; payment instruction dated **17 May 1943**, and Grindlays acknowledge on **19 May 1943**.
